text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright isn't feeling well, so I take her to
the infirmary to get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for the inconvenience, Trainer, but I
shall be focusing on resting for the time being.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh? This is... the Mejiro estate?

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Eiiight... Niiine... Ten! Ready or not, Bright, here I
come!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Goodness! I'd forgotten, but I'm in the middle of
a game of hide-and-seek with Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Where shall I hide today? I must remain
veeery sneaky as I conceal myself...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! Ryan would never expect me to tuck
myself away inside the storage shed, now would
she? ♪

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text: Bright? Where'd you go?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Over heeere... ♪ Come and find meee... ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teeheehee! Now to act surprised when Ryan
opens this door... ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Ryan?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Ryan? Have you gotten lost again?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...I'm here, Big Sis... So, just like you always do—

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah! Bright! Found ya!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...! Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text:
B-Bright?! What's wrong? ...Heh. Did you get
spooked in the dark?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
No, no. I'm not afraid at all, not even in the dark.
After all—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Wherever I happen to be, my wonderful big sister
will come and find me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe! What a delightful memory. Now, though,
I must ensure that this week's training is as
thorough as always.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm guessing that bout of rest did the trick
because Mejiro Bright is fighting fit again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Ryan? Have you gotten lost again?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
This game of hide-and-seek won't end until
you've found meee. ♪ Not to mention...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...I'm becoming quite lonely.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Ah. So it was a dream...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But of course it was. The real Mejiro Ryan would
come and find me no matter what...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like a bad dream kept Mejiro Bright from
getting much rest at all.
